dimensions.note: Docs-only slice: the single change is the README workflow example. No .ts changed. No credential, token, or secret material introduced; the report remains SDK-free pure data shaping over workflow artifacts.
No .ts edited, so no logging changed. The change is limited to the README workflow example block.
No code touched; the never-throws guard and skipped-artifact handling are unchanged. Only the README workflow YAML example was corrected.

Docs-only change (workflow example) needs no new tests; the existing suite is unaffected and stays green. The example's methodName list_clusters and modelType @jentz/aws-rds-inventory match the upstream model's single method.
Report-only extension: renders collected workflow data and creates/updates/deletes no external resources, so idempotency does not apply. Unchanged by this docs slice.
No external API client; the report consumes swamp data artifacts only and validates each with safeParse before use. This slice edits documentation and does not alter any consumed contract.

No file handles, sockets, or temp files; docs-only change introduces no new resources. The corrected workflow YAML example was validated in a throwaway workflow (schema check passed) and removed, leaving no stray artifacts.

manifest version bumped 2026.06.22.0 -> 2026.07.19.0 (report has no model.version to align). README workflow example corrected to the real schema (jobs array, task block with modelType @jentz/aws-rds-inventory + methodName list_clusters, reports.require). No real account IDs, IPs, or hostnames in source, README, or fixtures.
